meta.title: Enterprise Intelligence Platform Production Certification, Maturity Assessment & Release Baseline
honesty_contract: Never fabricate, never estimate; repository overrides assumptions

pre_certification_audit.note: Each tier verified by repository presence (service/route/migration), route registration, flag presence, and a defensive read-only getter probe. getter_ready reflects DB substrate (built ≠ populated).

duplicate_scan.note: Scan targets variants (v2/copy/clone/parallel/new) of the CERTIFIED tier files only — unrelated -v2 files elsewhere in the repo are out of scope for this tier-duplication check.

part1_integration.note: Integrated = route file present AND registered in routes.ts. Composability separately probed via each tier getter (Integrated ≠ Activated; getter_ready=false is honest dormant substrate, not an integration failure).

platform_stability.basis: Every certified tier route registered in routes.ts (structural).

service_stability.basis: Every persisting tier service file present on disk (structural).

api_stability.basis: Every certified tier route file present (structural).

part2_production_readiness.note: Structural stability flags are MEASURED by repository presence; repository/architecture stability scores are MEASURED by the 2.12 Automation-Governance engine and surfaced SEPARATELY (no composite). null = unmeasurable (substrate absent), never 0.

part3_enterprise_certification.note: Each component certified STRUCTURAL when its canonical implementation is present; substrate_ready reports whether the DB substrate is populated (Available ≠ Operational). Certified ≠ Production-Ready.

backward_compatibility.basis: Every tier flag defaults OFF → flag-OFF path is byte-identical legacy (structural; not runtime-diffed).

forward_compatibility.basis: New tiers are additive behind OFF flags; enabling is opt-in (structural).

migration_compatibility.basis: Each persisting tier ships a canonical forward-only migration file (structural presence).

api_compatibility.basis: Each tier owns a distinct BASE path; no existing route signatures modified (structural).

service_compatibility.basis: Each tier is a distinct service module composed, not forked (structural).

module_compatibility.basis: Tiers compose one another via read-only getters; no module replaced (structural).

repository_compatibility.basis: Additive tables + lazy ensure-schema on write paths only; reads to_regclass-probe (structural).

feature_flag_compatibility.basis: All tier flags present and default OFF (structural).

part4_compatibility.note: Compatibility here is STRUCTURALLY verified (repository + flag defaults), NOT runtime regression-tested. Validated ≠ Production-Ready.

identity.basis: All certification routes flow through the platform requireAuth principal (session/JWT verified); no header-trust.

authorization.basis: Certification routes require auth + super-admin behind the flag gate.

secrets.basis: Composer reads no secrets; it composes getters + repository files only.

audit_trails.basis: Composer performs NO writes; it emits a point-in-time read-only report (no mutation to audit).

part5_security.note: Security is verified STRUCTURALLY (route gating + composition posture) and via the 2.12 governance engine (Policy-Exists ≠ Compliant). The composer itself is read-only and secret-free.

part6_performance.repository_scan: measured (synchronous fs reads; sub-millisecond, not separately timed)
part6_performance.note: No load-testing tooling is available in this environment, so throughput / percentile / runtime performance are NOT MEASURED (null, never estimated). Only the wall-clock latency of composing all tier getters (run once, in parallel) was measured.

per_domain.name: Platform Intelligence Registry
per_domain.basis: Built + integrated + composable; substrate not yet populated (Guided; built ≠ populated).

per_domain.basis: Built + integrated + composable; substrate not yet populated (Guided; built ≠ populated).

per_domain.basis: Built + integrated + composable; substrate not yet populated (Guided; built ≠ populated).

per_domain.basis: Built + integrated + composable; substrate not yet populated (Guided; built ≠ populated).

per_domain.name: Platform Intelligence Operations
per_domain.basis: Built + integrated + exposed; no getter to probe substrate (Guided).

per_domain.name: Intelligence Automation & Governance
per_domain.basis: Built + integrated + composable; substrate not yet populated (Guided; built ≠ populated).

per_domain.name: Enterprise Intelligence Integration
per_domain.basis: Built + integrated + composable; substrate not yet populated (Guided; built ≠ populated).

platform_maturity_floor.note: Honest FLOOR (minimum) across domains — NOT a composite/averaged score.

ceiling.basis: Maturity ceiling is Managed: human approval is authoritative and no autonomous unreviewed optimization exists.

levels_withheld.reason: WITHHELD — requires MEASURED runtime-adoption + self-adjusting behaviour evidence, which does not exist for these internal subsystems.
WITHHELD — requires autonomous, unreviewed self-optimization, which is deliberately out of scope (human approval mandatory).

part7_maturity.note: Per-domain maturity is DERIVED from measured signals (built / integrated / composable / substrate-ready). Levels 4–5 are never awarded here. Mature ≠ Complete.

repository_baseline.note: Counted by filesystem scan at composition time.

database_baseline.note: Forward-only migration files on disk (the schema-of-record); no row counts taken (read-only).

registry_baseline.note: 12 engine-bearing MX-800 tiers certified (2.2 Constitution is doc-only).

part8_release_baseline.note: Release baseline is a MEASURED point-in-time repository snapshot (file counts) plus the official phase freeze list. repository_commit is null (no git tooling invoked from this read-only composer) — null ≠ 0. Freezing is a structural marker, NOT a deployment.

no_business_logic_change.evidence: Phase 2.14 ships only a read-only certification composer + probe route; it composes existing getters and performs NO writes/DDL/persistence.

no_dormant_capability_activation.evidence: All certified tier flags default OFF; certification reports the dormant substrate honestly rather than activating it.

part_quality.note: Quality is MEASURED by repository scan + flag defaults. Built-but-OFF tiers are reported as dormant, NOT as activated and NOT as technical debt.

part_production_readiness_axes.reason: Structural integration, quality and compatibility are CERTIFIED, but Production-Ready is WITHHELD by design: these internal intelligence subsystems have no runtime adoption + realized-outcome evidence, and structural certification must never be composited into a production-confidence claim.
part_production_readiness_axes.note: The four axes (Structural ⟂ Integration ⟂ Validation ⟂ Production-Confidence) are reported SEPARATELY and never blended. production_confidence = null (not 0) because it is unmeasurable here, not because it is zero.

part9_implementation_output.note: Phase 2.14 adds NO capability — it only certifies. Every certified tier is Already-Existing; nothing here is Extended. Dormant = built behind a default-OFF flag (honest, NOT technical debt). Deferred items are WITHHELD by design, not failures.

program_completion.note: All MX-800 phases (2.1–2.14) frozen as the official Enterprise Intelligence Platform — STRUCTURALLY certified. Production-Ready is WITHHELD (Integrated ≠ Certified ≠ Production-Ready). Human approval mandatory.

platform_maturity_floor.note: Honest FLOOR (minimum) across domains — NOT a composite/averaged score.

maturity_ceiling.basis: Maturity ceiling is Managed: human approval is authoritative and no autonomous unreviewed optimization exists.

verdict.reason: Structural integration, quality and compatibility are CERTIFIED, but Production-Ready is WITHHELD by design: these internal intelligence subsystems have no runtime adoption + realized-outcome evidence, and structural certification must never be composited into a production-confidence claim.
